title: [Griffin's Keen, Snow Scramble]
description: The thin trail crawls up the mountain face, making upright travel impossible.  The wind stirs up the blanket of snow that covers everything, muffling the shapes of the rock and making a careless step a potential disaster.

wayto.4580: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'up'
wayto.4582: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
